name: brainstorming
description: Facilitate interactive brainstorming sessions using diverse creative techniques and ideation methods. Use when the user says help me brainstorm or help me ideate.

name: party-mode
description: Orchestrates group discussions between all installed BMAD agents, enabling natural multi-agent conversations. Use when user requests party mode.

name: sprint-execute
description: Orchestrate a complete sprint execution cycle — story writing, development, QA/testing, and defect fixing for each story, then sprint-level retrospective, adversarial review, and red team. All issues must be resolved before the sprint closes.

name: epic-execute
description: Orchestrate a complete epic execution cycle — running sprint(s) for all stories, then epic-level retrospective, adversarial review, red team, architectural drift analysis, and functional completeness review against requirements. All Critical and High issues must be resolved before the epic closes.
